b9962ac6a519.plainText: Why Choose Bratton PT After Knee Replacement One-on-one sessions — your therapist is with you for every minute 45–60 minute appointments for thorough, unhurried care Manual therapy to reduce scar tissue and improve joint mobility Personalized progression — we meet you where you are Close communication with your surgeon when needed No referral needed — we coordinate directly with your orthopedist

Why Choose Bratton PT After Knee Replacement

  • One-on-one sessions — your therapist is with you for every minute
  • 45–60 minute appointments for thorough, unhurried care
  • Manual therapy to reduce scar tissue and improve joint mobility
  • Personalized progression — we meet you where you are
  • Close communication with your surgeon when needed
  • No referral needed — we coordinate directly with your orthopedist
